meta.hist_note: Wells Fargo course_num=872 (2018,2019,2021,2023,2024) + PGA Championship course_num=241 (2017,2025, event_id=33). Excluded: 2016=old QH layout(698), 2022=TPC Potomac, 2025 Truist=Philadelphia CC.
